title: Plan a propagation program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan a propagation program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary planning activities for a plant propagation program

pcs.text: Determine production requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine production requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine production requirements.

pcs.text: Determine propagation techniques, taking into account the species, cultivar and horticultural practice

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine propagation techniques, taking into account the species, cultivar and horticultural practice.

pcs.text: Determine environmental parameters and space requirements that impact on propagation program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine environmental parameters and space requirements that impact on propagation program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.
